findings.message: The overall acceptance count is incorrect: it says "All 31 root files moved," but this plan's own target layout moves 34 root files (36 total minus 2 registries kept at root). This can cause ambiguous completion criteria.

The CI-script scope is undercounted as "7 path references"; current script has 10 matching occurrences of affected startup-loop paths. Undercounting increases risk of partial updates and broken contract checks.
The summary and task naming require "test pass," but repository policy states tests run in CI only. The plan should explicitly gate test pass via CI watch, not imply local test execution.

Verification uses full-repo `pnpm typecheck` / `pnpm lint`, which conflicts with repo policy preferring scoped package validation (`pnpm --filter <pkg> ...`) plus `bash scripts/validate-changes.sh` by default.

The plan assumes all references were exhaustively identified, but reference scope is still incomplete (for example, moved-doc references in `.claude/skills/_shared/queue-check-gate.md` and `.claude/skills/startup-loop/modules/cmd-advance.md` are not included in TASK-05 file scope).
TASK-06 marks affected paths as `[readonly]`, but the execution plan says to "fix any new failures," which requires writes; this is internally inconsistent.
